The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. While the patient is on Ezetimibe, which is a medication used to manage cholesterol levels, there is no indication that a diagnosis of a lipid disorder has been made or is actively being managed. The presence of other serious medical conditions and the complexity of the patient's health status do not imply a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next visit. Therefore, based on the information provided, I predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
